recap:
- Databricks offers AI-powered document parsing to convert unstructured documents into structured data.
- The parsing process allows for the extraction of tables, images, and text from stored files.
- Structured data facilitates easier analysis, searching, and the creation of downstream workflows.
- Real-world applications often require parsing documents to build a structured knowledge base.
- A structured knowledge base enhances the context available to language models, improving their performance.
